scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @cpl/platform & npm run dev --workspace @cpl/tracking
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @cpl/platform && npm run build --workspace @cpl/tracking
scripts.start: npm run start --workspace @cpl/platform & npm run start --workspace @cpl/tracking
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @cpl/platform && npm run lint --workspace @cpl/tracking
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @cpl/platform && npm run typecheck --workspace @cpl/tracking
scripts.build:production: npm run build:tracking && npm run build:platform
